title: clypeola jonthlaspi subsp. gaudinii
intro: Clypeola jonthlaspeus subsp. gaudinii, also known as lesser cress or bird's-eye cress, is a perennial plant in the Brassicaceae family, characterized by its small white flowers and pungent aroma. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it a potential treatment for various health issues. The health benefits of Clypeola jonthlaspeus subsp. gaudinii include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant are often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
